text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I was looking at my terrarium this morning, and I
noticed the moss had sprouted flowers.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Just like a real forest, every day brings new, small
changes...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But there's something about flowers that just
sparks joy, isn't there?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It truly makes you realize that there's a little
world down there, living and changing.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If you ever wish to give terrariums a try, I highly
recommend it. ♪
